name: form-field
title: BTFormField
description: Utility wrapper that provides a linked <label>, helper/error text display, and aria wiring (aria-invalid, aria-required, aria-describedby) for any slotted BT input component. Provides 'bt-form-field-id' via inject so slotted inputs can link their id to the label's htmlFor. No validation logic.

files.content:
export { default as BTFormField } from './BTFormField.vue';
export type { BTFormFieldProps } from './BTFormField.types';
